violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Steaks were being thawed in a tub without running water. These must be thawed under running water.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of clear lids was stored on the floor by the furnace in the basement.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Foam containers on the middle shelf below the microwaves were not inverted.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. The new women’s restroom did not have a trash can with a lid.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The wall by the pizza ovens needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. A hole was in the wall where a shelf bracket used to be. This was located by the pizza ovens.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
